prompt: A close-up UI mockup of an API key configuration section in a dark terminal-style app. Background #0c0c12, monospace font. Shows: 'GOOGLE API KEY' label in tiny uppercase gray. Below it, an input field with dark background #08080c, 1px border #1a1a2e, showing 'AIza•••••••••••••••••' in monospace. To the right of the input field, a small link text 'Get API Key →' in blue #7aa2f7 that would open a browser. Below the input, tiny gray text: 'Required for Gemini Embedding 2. Free tier: 1500 req/day'. Below that, a green status indicator: '● Connected' or a red one '○ Invalid key'. The whole thing is compact — about 220px wide, fitting in a sidebar panel. No decorative elements, pure terminal aesthetic.
